blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): credentials expired or invalid. Auth code fix verified (emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }) but cannot test sign-up flow without database.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): cannot create test account to verify login flow.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): cannot authenticate to access dashboard layout.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): cannot authenticate to access /dashboard/chat.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): cannot authenticate to test chat message sending.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): cannot authenticate to test sign-out flow.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): full user flow (landing → sign-up → dashboard → sign-out → sign-in) requires working database.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): AI chat end-to-end requires authenticated dashboard access.
Neon DB authentication failure (P1000): session persistence test requires working authentication.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented Neon DB authentication failure (P1000) as blocking issue. Updated known quirks with credential expiry details.

rootCause: Neon PostgreSQL cloud database credentials in .env have expired or are invalid. Prisma returns P1000 ('Authentication failed against the database server, the provided database credentials are not valid'). The auth code fix (emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }) and turbo env passthrough fix are both verified in source code, but all 9 assertions requiring authentication are blocked by the external database being inaccessible. This is NOT an application code issue — it requires refreshing the Neon DB credentials in .env.

codeFixesVerified.turboEnvPassthrough: Confirmed globalPassThroughEnv in turbo.json includes DATABASE_URL, BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, and all other env vars
